title: Note inside! — bottle pops open softly, paper slides into Sara's palm
prompt: Tight close-up on @beach-shore at the gentle calm wet tide line. @sara-beach already kneeling with both hands gently holding the @magic-bottle, the small cork stopper just gently lifted out and resting in her right palm with a soft *thwop* sound. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — right hand on the cork, left hand cupped under the open bottle. The tiny rolled paper @rescue-note already softly resting in Sara's open left palm, just slid out of the bottle. @eva-beach already pressed in close beside Sara on the LEFT, kneeling with both knees softly on the wet sand, both hands clasped softly in her lap with curly blonde hair and rainbow bow falling forward. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both clasped softly in her lap, NEITHER hand touching the bottle or note. Both girls lean in close over the open hand with the rolled paper. The empty bottle still emits a soft faint aqua-blue magical glow. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara holds up the tiny rolled paper note carefully between her thumb and finger of her right hand, eyes huge. Sara (small breathless gasp): "It's a NOTE!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva (mouth a small 'O' of wonder, leaning in even closer): "Open it open it open it!" Both girls stay kneeling close together on the wet sand. Calm cheerful kid-show ocean ambiance throughout. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing of facial features, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift on clothing or skin tone. Keep all character bodies stable, consistent in scale, and locked to the same outfit and hairstyle from second 0 through the final second. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Both girls stay kneeling with knees softly on the wet sand throughout — no jumping, no leaping. The wet sand stays plain wet sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
